name: Banana Passover Sponge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks with sugar until creamy.
2. Add mashed bananas, beating well after each addition.
3. In a separate bowl, whip egg whites until stiff peaks form.
4. Gradually add cake meal, potato starch, and salt to the yolk mixture.
5. Gently fold in the whipped egg whites alternately into the yolk mixture.
6. Stir in vanilla extract.
7. Preheat oven to 325°F (160°C). Grease an angel food cake pan or line with parchment paper.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for about 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Cool the cake upside down in the pan for approximately 30 minutes, or until completely cooled.
10. Cut the cake horizontally into two layers using a sharp knife.
11. Frost the cake with whipped cream or cool whip and garnish with sliced bananas and walnuts.
